modules.sql: SELECT CAST(c.id AS INTEGER) AS customer_id, COALESCE(c.first_name, '') AS first_name, COALESCE(c.last_name, '') AS last_name, c.birthdate, CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS age, CASE WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) < 26 THEN '18-25' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 35 THEN '26-35' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 45 THEN '36-45' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 55 THEN '46-55' WHEN (CAST(strftime('%Y', c.ifw_effective_date) AS INTEGER) - CAST(strftime('%Y', c.birthdate) AS INTEGER) - CASE WHEN strftime('%m-%d', c.birthdate) > strftime('%m-%d', c.ifw_effective_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) <= 65 THEN '56-65' ELSE '65+' END AS age_bracket, COALESCE(pp.phone_number, '') AS primary_phone, COALESCE(pe.email_address, '') AS primary_email, c.ifw_effective_date FROM customers c LEFT JOIN (SELECT pn.customer_id, pn.phone_number FROM phone_numbers pn INNER JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MIN(rowid) AS min_rowid FROM phone_numbers GROUP BY customer_id) pf ON pn.rowid = pf.min_rowid AND pn.customer_id = pf.customer_id) pp ON CAST(c.id AS INTEGER) = pp.customer_id LEFT JOIN (SELECT ea.customer_id, ea.email_address FROM email_addresses ea INNER JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MIN(rowid) AS min_rowid FROM email_addresses GROUP BY customer_id) ef ON ea.rowid = ef.min_rowid AND ea.customer_id = ef.customer_id) pe ON CAST(c.id AS INTEGER) = pe.customer_id
